qualifications.name: BHSc in Medical Laboratory Sciences
notes: Department: Biomedical Sciences.
APS score: 38+.

Faculty notes: Preference will be given to candidates with higher APS scores; Some programmes have Extended Curriculum Programme options; Some programmes require selection interviews, medical assessments, physical assessments, environmental assessments, health screening questionnaires, or Hepatitis inoculation.
Recommended school subjects: English; Mathematics or Mathematical Literacy; Physical Science; Life Science.

Medical imaging stream capacity: diagnostic_radiography: Maximum 65 candidates per year; radiation_therapy: Maximum 14 candidates per year; nuclear_medicine_technology: Maximum 7 candidates per year; diagnostic_ultrasound: Maximum 12 candidates per year.
